case_title: THOMAS PUBLISHING CO. A CORP. vs. RIKO, CO. LTD, A CORP. DBA KEVIN LIN et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS PUBLISHING CO. A CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT RIKO, CO. LTD, A CORP. DBA KEVIN LIN DOES 1-3 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-23-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-24-1999 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-06-1999
JUDICIAL COUNCILCIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS PUBLISHING CO. A CORP.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-23-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, OSC DIRECTED TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY STANLEY PECK TO FILE POS OR TO FILE SIGNED ORDER TO PUBLISH; TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT HEARING SET FOR SEP-01-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, FILED BY PLTF'S ATTORNEY
DECLARATION RE: ATTEMPTED SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-01-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY PECK STANLEY. HEARING SET FOR OCT-13-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, FILED BY PLTF'S ATTORNEY

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-13-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY PECK STANLEY. HEARING SET FOR NOV-17-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-17-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY PECK STANLEY. HEARING SET FOR DEC-29-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-29-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-29-1999, TO FILE POS AND ORDER TO PUBLISH; OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY PECK STANLEY, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-13-2000 CONTINUED FROM DEC-29-1999 TO FEB-23-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTIONS IMPOSED ON 12-29-99 ARE VACATED. DISMISSAL FILED ON 12-27-99.
